programme.desc: Devina a newspaper journalist from Lucknow falls in love with Kashi and things go awry when Kashi's sister Ganga goes missing. Release Year: 2018 Director: Dhiraj Kumar

programme.title: E16 - Shallot Boat
programme.desc: After a night of strong rain, the Shallots set sail on a seafaring adventure.

programme.title: E4 - Grapes
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's the spectacular acrobatic grapes working together to perform the most difficult structures to perfection.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E13 - Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: E14 - Top Fun
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!

programme.title: E1 - Tato Tower Takeover
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes over the Tato Tower HQ and uses Carrot's new security system to keep Supertato out. Supertato and Carrot work on a cunning ice cream plan to sneak back in.

programme.title: E2 - Evil Pea's Big Freeze
programme.desc: Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

programme.title: E13 - The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E14 - The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E35 - Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: E38 - Copycat
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.desc: Renowned 'consulting detective' Sherlock Holmes has a reputation for solving the most complex mysteries. With the aid of his trusted ally Dr. John Watson, Holmes is unequaled in his pursuit of criminals.

programme.title: E248 - Mysteries Of The Maya
programme.desc: New evidence is being discovered that completely upends our understanding of this ancient culture... and might provide evidence that the Maya came in contact with extraterrestrial visitors.

programme.title: E12 - Bermuda Triangle's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The team unveils the greatest mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle: its most perplexing vanished ships and planes, and the strange and powerful forces said to be behind the Triangle's deadly reputation.

programme.title: E390 - The Diy Delorean
programme.desc: Mike meets a kindred spirit at a defunct Wisconsin railroad town and uncovers vintage treasures. Meanwhile, Robbie becomes obsessed with getting a one-of-a-kind DeLorean knockoff back on the road.

programme.title: E10 - Highlight 10
programme.desc: In this week’s episode Recovery Op Jim is called to the scene of two crashed artics on the M1. But as Jim and his team begin to pull the truck and trailer apart, they discover the crash has split the hydraulic oil tank and it’s now leaking all over the road making the job a whole lot more complicated! Recovery Op Rory attends what looks like a simple job, but some hidden vandalism leaves him scratching his head and needing to improvise. Rookie wrecker driver Warren faces a day on the hard shoulder of the motorway trying to rescue some highly unusual vehicles - a potentially occupied prison van and a group of shark fishers…

programme.title: E10 - Highlight 10
programme.desc: In this week’s episode Recovery Op Jim is called to the scene of two crashed artics on the M1. programme.title: E6 - Halibut, Lobster & Seaweed
programme.desc: On a very special episode, Daniel fishes halibut and lobster, and also forages seaweed for the most important dinner of his life - Avani and his wedding!

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E8 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E109 - Splinter and April Fight a Goldfish
programme.desc: When the Lair floods, April goes to save Splinter... but he won't leave the sewer! To make matters worse, the mutant called GOLDFIN comes with a warning... stay out of his way, or else!

programme.title: E205 - Dude, Where's My Man Buggy?
programme.desc: When Danger Force borrows Ray's beloved Man Buggy without permission it falls into the hands of criminals Stupid Jeff and The Toddler. Now the team must track it down and get it back before Ray finds out.

programme.title: E250 - Broken Alarm / Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: E707 - Road Trip: From Brad to Worse / Road Trip: Doll Day Afternoon
programme.desc: When the Louds run into Mom's old camp crush turned celebrity at a State Fair, Dad tries to one-up him to impress Rita. // Realizing Mr. Coconuts is missing, Luan rallies the Louds to track him down along Route 66.

programme.title: E105 - Save the Date
programme.desc: Max bets Phoebe she can't turn off being a superhero and go on a normal date. Chloe helps Phoebe do well on the date, but Max tries to sabotage it by crying wolf. Suddenly, a real supervillain emerges and puts Max and Chloe in serious danger.

programme.title: E208 - Freaky Fri-Day-Day
programme.desc: A face-swap app causes Lay Lay and Sadie to switch bodies, forcing both girls to live a day in the other's shoes before they can resolve the issue.

programme.title: E126 - Jasper's Real Girlfriend
programme.desc: Jasper’s summer camp girlfriend comes to town staying with Charlotte. She quickly becomes jealous thinking Charlotte is in love with Jasper. Charlotte begins to question the girl's sanity.

programme.title: E216 - iMake Sam Girlier
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: E708 - Road Trip: Screen Queen / Road Trip: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: When the Louds' road trip takes them to Hollywood, Lola is determined to become a star and land a leading role. // To help Mom make the deadline for her column, the Louds have to avoid the Casagrandes when they visit Great Lakes City.

programme.title: E223 - Class Action Heroes
programme.desc: Danger Force is crushing it at Swellview Junior High, but Ray misses his sidekicks and schemes to get them out of school.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Tub Flip Machine
programme.desc: James and his team connect with Tyler, an aspiring flipper with a lead on a zombie house. But entrusting such a big job to a partner with little experience makes them question whether he can do it.

programme.title: E1 - Iraqi Salmon & Date Brownies
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city, Florence, he's determined to have a mural.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Jamie gets frugal with leftovers as he makes spaghetti frittata, rustles up pork pies in the air fryer and whips up thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies.

programme.title: E3 - New York
programme.desc: Finishing the series in the concrete jungle, Zuu and AJ check out how the 1%ers of New York splash their cash. Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place.

programme.title: E8 - Treat Days
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain creates dishes to indulge in on treat days, dodges bees with Robert at his hives and discovers how to make perfect rice with Dr Stuart.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! He's got a speedy, tasty twist on your Sunday roast that keeps it all in one pan; and puts store-cupboard essentials centre stage in two fabulous family meals that are made in minutes. Finally, YouTube sensation Alex Ainouz shares his fabulous 5-ingredient take on a French classic.

Sampling $2000 gold leaf pizza - the most expensive in the world - the pair put in a shift at the 2-Michelin starred restaurant The Modern, and try $3,000 jacket potatoes at the Mark, and AJ's favourite pizza place.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city, Florence, he's determined to have a mural.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Jamie gets frugal with leftovers as he makes spaghetti frittata, rustles up pork pies in the air fryer and whips up thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! He's got a speedy, tasty twist on your Sunday roast that keeps it all in one pan; and puts store-cupboard essentials centre stage in two fabulous family meals that are made in minutes. Finally, YouTube sensation Alex Ainouz shares his fabulous 5-ingredient take on a French classic.

E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E4 - The Mesoamerican Reef
programme.desc: The Mesoamerican Reef is a pristine ocean ecosystem- but after decades of overfishing and tourist activity, much of this reef is in jeopardy. These Parks are monitored by Ocean advocates dedicated to maintaining the shark feeding grounds, turtle populations and marine spawning grounds that line this incredible reef system.

programme.title: E4 - Reef Wrecks of Roatan
programme.desc: This island of the coast of Honduras stands out as a vacation resort hot spot. But it’s not just the sun and sand that brings the tourists in droves. It’s actually a diver’s paradise with shipwrecks scattered from all corners of the the island.

programme.title: E4 - Toto, Banksi, and Lucy
programme.desc: Flap around with Banksi the fruit bat and his human surrogate mom, eye a mischievous emu, and celebrate a pig’s rescue-versary. Tour manatee heaven and learn to speak baboon with Dingani, who has a one-of-a-kind kinship with his primate pal Lucy.

programme.title: E5 - Penny, Chunk, and Faith
programme.desc: Visit Penny the pigeon and the human who saved her, get a buzz from a refugee who found comfort in beekeeping, and see celebrity groundhogs. Dive with a shark dancer and feel touched by the deep, lifelong commitment Riana has to Faith the cheetah.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy
programme.desc: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered by his pal Fleur. Cause a little chaos with Quincy the quoll and hang ten with Chupacabra the surfing goat.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E4 - Toto, Banksi, and Lucy
programme.desc: Flap around with Banksi the fruit bat and his human surrogate mom, eye a mischievous emu, and celebrate a pig’s rescue-versary. Tour manatee heaven and learn to speak baboon with Dingani, who has a one-of-a-kind kinship with his primate pal Lucy.

programme.title: E5 - Penny, Chunk, and Faith
programme.desc: Visit Penny the pigeon and the human who saved her, get a buzz from a refugee who found comfort in beekeeping, and see celebrity groundhogs. Dive with a shark dancer and feel touched by the deep, lifelong commitment Riana has to Faith the cheetah.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy
programme.desc: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered by his pal Fleur. Cause a little chaos with Quincy the quoll and hang ten with Chupacabra the surfing goat.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E4 - Rock Splitter
programme.desc: The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree stands rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa. It is the ultimate survivor, able to withstand the unforgiving conditions in a landscape facing ever rising temperatures and less and less rainfall each year.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: E1 - Oceans
programme.desc: Dive to the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the ocean’s most mysterious inhabitants. Journey across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales, then wander down to the ocean floor to witness breathtaking bioluminescence.

programme.title: E4 - Lakes
programme.desc: Journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives, and transforms. Witness the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle, watch a dragonfly metamorphosis, and walk tall with flamingoes as they brave burning, corrosive waters.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: One Mindanao
programme.desc: The newscast covers the most significant news and features in six regions in Mindanao.

programme.title: Rescue
programme.desc: A gripping reality-documentary that captures real-time rescue operations and crises, showcasing modern-day heroism in the face of danger.

programme.title: Front Row
programme.desc: Features a different full-length, cinema verite style documentary that often tackles social issues such as poverty and corruption.

programme.title: Agripreneur
programme.desc: Features the local agriculture industry from practical tips on animal raising and planting to stories of entrepreneurs behind the country's most profitable farms and agricultural spaces.

programme.title: Just Facts
programme.desc: A show that uses investigative journalism and compelling reportage to uncover the truth behind major issues, controversies, and underreported stories through in-depth reports and social experiments.

programme.title: Good News
programme.desc: A program that rounds up the trending feel-good stories in the Philippines and offers fashion tips and affordable healthy recipes for Kapuso viewers on a budget.

programme.desc: An award-winning investigative documentary program hosted by multi-awarded broadcast journalist Kara David.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Baby Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E530
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E4 - Homing Pigeon Postman
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: E6 - Bucephalus' Carousel
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: E51 - Talented Ones
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E2 - Getting Her Own Back
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

From Phoenix to the World, is a news program where reporters from around the world interact directly with the anchors through satellite and telephone lines to put audiences in touch with important events right form where they happen.

programme.title: E227 - Top View
programme.desc: TOP VIEW: High precision observation of space security and insight into the changes of the global situation. Travel through time and space and perceive the dimension of geography.

programme.title: E160
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E477
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: Talk With World Leaders (III)
programme.desc: TALK WITH WORLD LEADERS: Talk With World Leaders reveals compelling insights into key international figures in the fields of politics, industry, business, science and the arts, giving Chinese audiences a closer look at the world leaders.

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

programme.desc: China Financial Intelligence: Based in Shanghai, the program explores the economic development of mainland China in a comprehensive and in-depth way, so that the world can have a more accurate understanding of China and Shanghai.

E3 - A Little Pig In The City
programme.desc: Petanque has many enthusiasts in Switzerland. In Geneva, the bowling grounds are historic, such as the one in Les Cropettes, where people from all walks of life gather for the love of the game.

programme.title: E8 - Paname Plays With Stereotypes
programme.desc: Elegant, romantic, grumpy, always in a hurry: Parisians have quite a reputation. The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have changed the world's perception of the capital-turns out it's not that dirty, and its residents are rather welcoming! Today, which cliches still stick to their skin?

programme.title: E4 - The Unusual 2 Cvs
programme.desc: Laurent and Oceane travel to Saint-Ouen-le-Brisoult to discover unusual 2 CV models. Focus on the Peugeot 205 Rallye. Michel meets Florie, who restores seats for vintage cars and motorcycles.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs, Chateaux And Vines
programme.desc: Champagne, Saint-Emilion, the Loire Valley and Burgundy. In France today, four exceptional wine-growing regions have been awarded the prestigous title of world heritage sites. We explore these landscapes shaped by man...

programme.title: E8 - Charming Bivouacs!
programme.desc: With Scarabeo Camp, Belgian Vincent T'sas offers some fantastic escapes: bivouacs in the desert. Also featuring: made-to-measure perfume; auction, a Delvaux in New York; Belgian watches on Monegasque time.

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.title: E19 - Aquitaine, From Farm To Farm
programme.desc: With its 85,000 farms spread across 84,000 km2, Nouvelle-Aquitaine stands out as an undeniable European agricultural leader. From cereal plains to renowned vineyards and the largest cattle and goat farms in France, the region offers an agricultural landscape of exceptional richness.

programme.desc: A woman is declared the winner and praised for her humility, stirring jealousy in others. Meanwhile, anxiety grows when another woman collapses unconscious after a bomb blast.

programme.title: E7 - The Titan Games Trials 7
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: E122 - The Lake Break/Uss Mean Shark
programme.desc: The crew is completely worn out, so Jim decides to take them camping. But he struggles to give up his captain privileges. Just as he starts to relax, it’s already time to leave. Jim will do anything to delay their departure.

programme.title: E417 - Teen? Titans/Moonlighting

E3
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E9 - 解鎖你的人生坐標
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Blossoms Under Somewhere
programme.desc: Ching, a high school girl who wants to fall in love but feels isolated due to being born with a stutter, runs an online business with Rachel, her only friend. Ching unexpectedly gains the attention and love of buyers. As she submerges herself in this unethical business, Ching believes she has found true love. However, she is unaware that she has lost her only friendship.
